summary.lv: Mintos meklē Senior Power BI inženieri, lai projektētu mērogojamu Power BI vidi, optimizētu semantiskos modeļus un nodrošinātu self-service analīzi visā uzņēmumā.
summary.en: Mintos seeks a Senior Power BI Engineer to architect a scalable Power BI environment, optimize semantic models, and enable reliable self-service analytics across the business.
